news.summary: On May 14, 2025, in Rye, New York, The Gabelli Utility Trust's Board of Trustees (NYSE: GUT) announced the continuation of its practice of making fixed monthly cash distributions. The board approved cash distributions of $0.05 per share for July, August, and September 2025.
news.headline: Gabelli Utility Trust still giving monthly $0.05 per share distributions for July, August, and September 2025.

news.summary: In Dubai, UAE, the 25th Global Family Office Investment Summit was held by Anthony Ritossa and Lives Amplified Global Institution of World Leaders at the Mandarin Oriental Jumeira on May 6–7, 2025. The event saw over 300 global investors, family offices, and prominent figures gather to discuss investment strategies and opportunities.
news.headline: 25th Global Family Office Investment Summit in Dubai hosted 300+ investors and family offices on May 6-7, 2025.

news.summary: Bellevue, Washington - Today, T-Mobile revealed that the Samsung Galaxy XCover7 Pro will launch tomorrow at T-Mobile stores. This device, compatible with T-Mobile's T-Priority service, offers essential connectivity for first responders during emergencies in the burgeoning 5G public safety age. This solution provides robust construction, dependable real-time connection, and superior network priority, critical during large-scale crises. As of tomorrow, first responders will have access to this technology.
news.headline: Samsung Galaxy XCover7 Pro available at T-Mobile, certified for T-Mobile's T-Priority, designed for first responders.

news.summary: Tower Semiconductor Ltd, traded as TSEM on the NASDAQ, released their fiscal first-quarter results recently. The company saw a 9% increase in quarterly revenue from last year, reaching $358.17 million, slightly surpassing the analyst consensus of $358.15 million. Their adjusted earnings per share (EPS) stood at 45 cents, higher than the expected 38 cents by analysts. Gross profit rose to $73.17 million, a 0.8% increase year-on-year, with the margin dropping from 22.2% to 20.4%. Operating profit was reported at $32.9 million. With Tower Semiconductor adapting to Nvidia's architectural changes, an analyst predicts growth in AI optical networks. For a detailed report, visit Benzinga.com.
news.headline: Tower Semiconductor's Q1 revenue grew 9% YoY to $358.17M, beating estimates, but margins contracted.

news.summary: Collective 54, a community exclusively for professional services firm founders, recently celebrated a major achievement by its fifty members. Since 2020, these members have successfully completed over $3 billion in business sales across North America. The milestone was announced in Dallas on May 14, 2025.
news.headline: Collective 54 has supported the sale of 50 professional services firms. Members completed over $3 billion in sales since 2020.

news.summary: Union Home Mortgage has announced a collaboration with ARIVE in a move to enhance broker access and simplify the lending process. The partnership follows UHM's consistent growth and positions the company to better serve clients. The collaboration, announced on May 14, 2025, will expand opportunities for brokers and streamline the borrowing experience. This strategic move is part of UHM's commitment to innovation and customer satisfaction. Based in Strongsville, Ohio, UHM is an independent mortgage banking firm that has been making waves in the industry. The partnership with ARIVE, headquartered in San Ramon, California, signifies a significant step forward for both entities. This dynamic collaboration is poised to shake up the lending landscape and offer enhanced services to a wider range of clients.
news.headline: Union Home Mortgage joins ARIVE platform to expand broker access. Partnership announced on May 14, 2025.

news.summary: In a movement led by teenagers nationwide, efforts are being made to introduce phone-free proms. #HalfTheStory, a non-profit organization focused on enhancing young people's connection with technology, is collaborating with students throughout the US to introduce Screen Free Prom. The initiative aims to promote an evening without phones, allowing attendees to engage more fully in the experience. These efforts are gaining traction as more young people seek to reduce their reliance on technology for social events.
news.headline: #HalfTheStory and teens team up for Screen Free Prom campaign to promote phone-free proms nationwide.

news.summary: In Evanston, Illinois, the American Massage Therapy Association (AMTA) is drawing attention to the advantages of massage therapy for anxiety and depression during Mental Health Awareness Month in May 2025. The new research highlights the positive impact of massage therapy on mental health, with recent studies revealing promising results. The AMTA is emphasizing the importance of this holistic approach in addressing mental health issues and promoting overall well-being.
news.headline: New research by AMTA highlights benefits of massage therapy for mental health. Supports anxiety and depression. May 2025.

news.summary: Four prominent figures, Tiffani Thiessen, Nick DiGiovanni, Kylie Sakaida, and Steph Grasso, are spearheading Fresh Express into a new phase of culinary innovation. The leading brand in value-added salads, Fresh Express is launching its exciting "Express Yourself" campaign. The initiative aims to showcase creativity with four appealing talents on board. The press release was from ORLANDO, Florida, on May 14, 2025, published on PRNewswire.
news.headline: Fresh Express partners with culinary stars Tiffani Thiessen, Nick DiGiovanni, Kylie Sakaida, and Steph Grasso to promote creativity.

news.summary: On May 14, 2025, in Kendall Park, New Jersey, Thinkster, a company pioneering the integration of AI technology and education, unveiled its latest product, the AI Coach. This innovative tool is a voice-activated, multilingual education platform that focuses on results, transparency, and user engagement. Developed on a proprietary system, the AI Coach aims to revolutionize learning by providing personalized guidance to students.
news.headline: Thinkster launches patented AI Coach in Kendall Park, N.J., on May 14, 2025. Redefining scalable tutoring with voice-interactive, multilingual learning engine.

news.summary: On May 14, 2025, it was reported that the worldwide HVAC systems market is projected to hit USD 382.66 billion by 2030, with a compound annual growth rate (CAGR) of 7.5% from 2025 to 2030. This data is from a recent study conducted by Grand View Research, Inc. The increasing use of energy-efficient and renewable technologies is believed to be a key driver behind this growth.
news.headline: Global HVAC systems market to hit $382.66 billion revenue by 2030, with 7.5% CAGR from 2025 as per Grand View Research.

news.summary: On May 14, 2025, in San Francisco, Calibre One, a renowned global executive search firm known for creating exceptional leadership teams, welcomed Evan Fishel as their new Partner. With over 25 years of experience in executive search, Evan will be based in the Bay Area.
news.headline: Calibre One hires Evan Fishel as Partner to boost life sciences practice. Evan has over 25 years of experience.

news.summary: A new AI voice assistant called Nia has been launched by OhMD, a top patient communication platform for physician practices, on May 14, 2025, in Burlington, Vermont. Nia, powered by Twilio technology, enables healthcare practices to automate responses for common patient requests. This innovation aims to improve efficiency in patient care by streamlining processes and is set to make a significant impact in the healthcare industry.
news.headline: OhMD launches Nia, AI voice assistant for healthcare communication. Automates responses for patient requests. Powered by Twilio's ConversationRelay.

news.summary: A leading brand known for its ready-to-eat beans, rice, and seasoning sauces inspired by Creole, Caribbean, and Latin American recipes, A Dozen Cousins, has been acquired by Verde Valle Foods, an established company in the US for over 16 years, specializing in manufacturing, selling, and distributing rice and beans. Verde Valle Foods also owns Isadora, a renowned brand offering ready-to-eat beans and authentic Mexican meals in pouches. This acquisition marks a significant development in the industry, bringing together two key players in the market.
news.headline: Verde Valle Foods acquires A Dozen Cousins, a ready-to-eat beans brand, specializing in Creole, Caribbean, and Latin American recipes.

news.summary: A significant win for Zest Labs, Inc. against Walmart has been secured by Bartko Pavia LLP's trial team, spearheaded by Patrick M. Ryan, based in Little Rock, Arkansas. This victory has garnered attention due to its groundbreaking nature, and underscores the prowess of the legal team. The successful outcome signifies a milestone for Zest Labs, Inc. and serves as a testament to the expertise and dedication of Bartko Pavia LLP. The specifics of the case, including key figures and details of the win, underscore the importance and impact of this development in the legal realm.
news.headline: Bartko Pavia's Patrick M. Ryan secures $222M jury verdict for Zest Labs, Inc. against Walmart in Arkansas.

news.summary: In Toronto, Scene+ and Recipe Unlimited, Canada’s biggest full-service restaurant company, have recently renewed their partnership. This agreement ensures Recipe Unlimited stays as the sole dining partner for Scene+, enabling its 15 million members to earn and use Scene+ points at over 700 Recipe restaurant venues nationwide. The partnership renewal extends for three years, providing Scene+ members with continued opportunities to redeem their points while dining out.
news.headline: Scene+ and Recipe Unlimited renew partnership for 3 years, offering 15M members to earn/redeem points at 700+ restaurants in Canada.

news.summary: In Delray Beach, Florida, recent data from 2024 reveals that the worldwide CRISPR Market was worth US$2.90 billion. Projections suggest a strong growth trajectory, with a projected Compound Annual Growth Rate (CAGR) of 11.2%. By 2025, the market is expected to reach US$3.21 billion, and by 2030, an impressive figure of US$5.47 billion. This positive trend is attributed to the increasing interest in CRISPR-based gene therapies.
news.headline: Global CRISPR market to reach US$5.47 billion by 2030 with a CAGR of 11.2%, from US$2.90 billion in 2024.

news.summary: Amid increasing access disparities, Coral Care offers essential in-home developmental therapy such as speech, occupational, and physical therapy that is now covered by insurance. This beneficial service is being provided by Coral Care, a pediatric therapy platform that is dedicated to assisting families with children facing developmental delays. Reporting from Dallas on May 14, 2025, the platform aims to bridge the gap in access to therapy services and ensure that children in need receive the appropriate care.
news.headline: Coral Care offers in-home therapy in Texas for kids with developmental needs. Includes speech, OT, PT covered by insurance.

news.summary: On May 14, 2025, in Hoover, Alabama, Perfect Game, the largest youth baseball and softball platform and scouting service globally, collaborated with The Sports Facilities Companies (SFC), the top provider of sports and recreation venue management in the nation. The partnership unveiled a new initiative aimed at enhancing the development and opportunities for young athletes.
news.headline: Perfect Game and The Sports Facilities Companies will host a youth clinic with former MLB All-Stars at Hoover Met Complex prior to the SEC baseball tournament. Alabama, May 14, 2025. #youthclinic #SECbaseball #HooverMet

news.summary: In Kerrville, Texas, on May 14, 2025, James Avery Artisan Jewelry has the honor of being chosen as a US Best Managed Company for 2025. Supported by Deloitte Private and The Wall Street Journal, this initiative acknowledges exceptional private companies in the US. The 2025 recipients of this recognition showcase excellence in corporate management and strategy.
news.headline: James Avery Artisan Jewelry named a 2025 US Best Managed Company by Deloitte Private and The Wall Street Journal.

news.summary: On May 14, 2025, Stimvia, a Czech Republic-based medtech company, announced their graduation from the prestigious Endless Frontier Labs (EFL) program at NYU Stern School of Business. The company specializes in creating a non-invasive neuromodulation device to address overactive bladder (OAB) issues. This innovative technology aims to revolutionize OAB treatment worldwide.
news.headline: Stimvia, a Czech medtech company, graduates from NYU Stern's accelerator with OAB therapy, targets US market.

news.summary: Landrum, South Carolina - On May 14, 2025, FlackTek™, a top player in high-velocity mixing and processing solutions, restated its dedication to American manufacturing. Each FlackTek device is meticulously crafted, engineered, and put together in the United States. This intentional choice underscores the company's commitment to supporting domestic production and jobs.
news.headline: FlackTek manufactures mixing solutions in the USA for global market, emphasizing American manufacturing commitment.

news.summary: The Cyphers Agency, a comprehensive marketing and creative agency headquartered in Crofton, Maryland, is showcasing robust expansion despite a sluggish economy. On May 14, 2025, the agency revealed the welcome inclusion of three fresh clients to its burgeoning portfolio.
